summary:
Claim: Beta-1,3-glucan assay is not used in diagnosis of Pneumocystis jirovecii pneumonia.
Evidence:  
• Direct antigen detection methods are preferred over β-1,3-glucan for identifying Pneumocystis due to specific cyst wall proteins.
• All other listed fungi do not have significant amounts of β-1,3-glucan making it less useful as a diagnostic marker compared to antigen-specific tests.
Answer: D
To further elaborate and ensure clarity:
